message:
test(conformance): add auto-generated per-extension conformance tests (bd-15jg)

Add 1,414-line test module that generates individual #[test] functions
for every extension in VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json via the conformance_test!
macro, providing parallel execution and per-extension pass/fail isolation:

tests/ext_conformance_generated.rs:
- Reads VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json at test time via OnceLock for one-time
  deserialization across all generated tests
- conformance_test! macro expands to individual test functions per
  extension ID, each loading the extension via JsExtensionRuntimeHandle
  and verifying registration correctness (tools, commands, flags, event
  handlers) against manifest declarations
- Tiers 1-2 run by default; tiers 3-5 are #[ignore] (multi-file
  extensions, npm dependencies, UI integrations, platform-specific)
- Gated behind --features ext-conformance to avoid requiring Bun in
  standard cargo test runs
- Each test emits structured JSONL logs with extension ID, tier, source,
  capabilities, and pass/fail result

Run: cargo test --test ext_conformance_generated --features ext-conformance

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
